profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Bersama Mencapai Puncak Tbk operates and manages a chain of restaurants. It operates through Raw Material, Outlet, and Others segments. The company also trades in raw materials, such as frozen food and necessities. It offers chicken thighs, squids, dim sum, vegetables, serundeng, shrimps, noodles, and frozen duck. The company was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Malang, Indonesia. PT Bersama Mencapai Puncak Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Anak Baik Sejahtera.
